name: §6Kuudra
description:
§8Combat Pet

§7Health: §c400
§7Strength: §c40

§6Crimson
§7Grants §a20% §7extra Crimson Essence.

§6Wither Bait
§7Increases the odds of finding a
§7vanquisher by §a20%§7.

§6Kuudra Fortune
§7Grants §6+50☘ Mining Fortune §7while on
§7the §cCrimson Isle§7.

§6Trophy Bait
§7Grants §6+20♔ Trophy Fish Chance
§7while on the §cCrimson Isle§7.

§6Kuudra Specialist
§7Increases all damage to Kuudra and
§7his minions by §c?%§7.

§8This pet's perks are active even
§8when the pet is not summoned!

§8This pet automatically has Exp share!

§8This pet only gains XP on the
§cCrimson Isle§8!

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

§8§l* §8Soulbound §8§l*

variants.name: Abyssal Kuudra Skin
variants.lore:
§8Consumed on use

§7Pet skins change the look and
§7particle trail of your pet but only
§7one skin can be active at a time!

§7This skin can only be applied to
§aKuudra§7 pets.

§eRight-click on your summoned pet to
§eapply this skin!

§5This skin adapts to your Crimson Isle
